name: aspose-mcp-server
description: Office document processing MCP server powered by Aspose.Total. Supports Word, Excel, PowerPoint, PDF, OCR, Email, and BarCode operations.
long_description:
Aspose MCP Server exposes Aspose.Total document processing capabilities as MCP tools for Claude Desktop. 118 tools across 7 categories: Word, Excel, PowerPoint, PDF, OCR, Email, BarCode.

Requires an Aspose license for production use. Evaluation mode (with Aspose watermarks) works without a license.

license_path.title: Aspose License File / Aspose 授權檔
license_path.description: Path to your Aspose.Total.lic or individual component .lic file. Leave empty to run in evaluation mode (Aspose watermarks will appear on output). / 您的 Aspose.Total.lic 或元件 .lic 檔案路徑。留空則以評估模式執行（輸出將帶 Aspose 浮水印）。
